prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: MCN-CAMOFORM-AMZ-PARENT Product Type: SPORTING_GOODS Brand (from catalog): GEAR AID Existing Title: GEAR AID Camo Form Self-Cling and Reusable Camouflage Wrap, 2" x 144" Roll Description: When you need to conceal guns or camouflage gear without leaving behind a sticky residue only one gun camo will do. Camo Form by Tactical is a self-adhering, camouflage wrap that is removable and reusable. Use it on guns, scopes, knives, treestands, flashlights whatever you're taking into the field.

Camo Form stretches and sticks to itself, and conforms to any shape for a custom fit. When it gets dirty or wet, simply remove, wash, let dry and reapply. The heavy-duty fabric not only protects and conceals tactical gear, but it also adds grip, insulates hands from hot or cold surfaces and quiets clanking objects.

Available in 14 traditional and digital camo patterns, Camo Form keeps gear and guns concealed, covered and ready for action. Search Terms: camouflage vinyl wrap tape reusable fabric hunting camping for and Features: - Adhesive-free, self-adhering camoflauge fabric wrap; protects guns and equipment from field scratches - Heavy duty stretch fabric wrap clings to itself; wraps and conforms to any shape; dramatically improves grip and insulates hands from hot or cold surfaces - Easy to cut; one 2" x 144" roll covers a standard rifle or shotgun - Will not leave a sticky residue when removed; reusable and washable fabric can be used multiple times - Made in USA === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: GEAR AID Camo Form Self-Cling Camouflage Wrap 2" x 144"

openai.item_name: GEAR AID 2" x 144" Camo Form Reusable Camouflage Wrap

anthropic.title_differentiation: Reusable Adhesive-Free, Washable, Stretches To Any Shape, Improves Grip, Insulates, Made In USA

openai.title_differentiation: Adhesive-Free Fabric, Washable And Reusable, No Sticky Residue, Improves Grip, Insulates Hands, Made In USA
